meta.title: Liu Huan · Front-end Architecture & Engineering
meta.description: Liu Huan: 10+ years in front-end and architecture; front-end lead for Tencent Music's open-source Supersonic ChatBI. Former senior front-end at Ping An Smart City. B.A. from Xi'an University of Finance and Economics. Focus areas include platform engineering, BI, open source, and AI agents.

hero.name: Liu Huan
hero.title: Front-end Architecture & Platform Engineering
hero.role: Senior Front-end Engineer / Front-end Architecture Lead
hero.bio1: Over 10 years in front-end development and architecture, with long-term involvement in data platforms, BI, and complex business systems—full lifecycle experience taking large-scale products from 0 to 1.
hero.bio2Prefix: Front-end lead for Tencent Music's open-source ChatBI project
hero.bio2Suffix: ; hands-on delivery across platform engineering, BI, and AI Data Agents, including LLM workflow orchestration for analytics scenarios.

expertise.title: Core Strengths
expertise.subtitle: Product planning, interaction design, and engineering in one flow—shipping complex data capabilities in a clear, scalable way.

items.title: Complex Platform Architecture
items.desc: Led front-end architecture for data platforms and BI products; built a schema-driven visualization system supporting multi-line analytics.

items.title: AI Data Agent
items.desc: Designed agent workflow engines connecting data retrieval, chart matching, and report generation to automate analytics pipelines.

items.title: LLM Workflows
items.desc: Connected semantic layers, queries, and presentation in analytics—improving orchestration UX, stability, and control for large models.

items.title: Open Source Leadership
items.desc: Front-end lead for Tencent Music's Supersonic open-source project—ChatBI product experience, architecture, and community maintainability.

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.subtitle: At Tencent Music: enterprise BI, AI Data Agents, and open-source Supersonic. Previously at Ping An Smart City: government BI and cross-platform smart education apps.

tencent.coreTag: Core: Enterprise BI Platform & AI Data Agent
bullets: Product: Owned core requirements and interaction prototypes; aligned technical solutions with business goals.
Platform: Built enterprise BI front-end and schema-driven visualization components for multi-line analytics.
Agent loop: Designed workflow engines linking retrieval, chart matching, and report generation.
ossBullets: Product: Defined open-source roadmap and releases; continuously improved ChatBI UX.
Architecture: Headless BI with semantic-model-driven configuration; decoupled business logic from presentation.
AI interaction: Conversational analytics with streaming, multi-turn context, and chart recommendations.

pingan.biTag: Government BI: Smart City Data Cockpit
biBullets: Refactor: Extended Apache Superset plugins, layout engine, and exploration modules for self-service analytics.
Visualization: Custom 3D and dynamic charts with Three.js and D3.js—balancing expressiveness and render performance.
appBullets: Cross-platform: Built React Native app architecture from scratch; shipped iOS and Android.
Performance: Tuned render cycles and native bridges; fixed long-list jank and media loading bottlenecks.

roles.desc: Delivered enterprise web applications end to end.
Developed control software for semiconductor precision equipment.

project.title: Supersonic · ChatBI
project.subtitlePrefix: Tencent Music's open-source ChatBI project combining Headless BI and conversational analytics. See
project.heading: Semantic-model-driven conversational analytics
project.desc: Led feature planning, release roadmap, overall front-end architecture, and conversational analytics UX—dynamic configuration driven by semantic models and presentation decoupling under Headless BI.

education.title: Education & Languages
education.school: Xi'an University of Finance and Economics
education.languagesDesc: English: strong reading and writing; comfortable in everyday conversation.
